title: Bloons Battles
description: Pop all the balloons while avoiding obstacles. Aim carefully and unlock all levels.
instructions: Use mouse or touch to aim and shoot.

title: Cowboy Shooter 2
description: Step into the Wild West and test your aim in this fast-paced cowboy shooting game! Break bottles, hit targets, and score as high as possible before the clock runs out.
instructions: PC: Move mouse to aim, Left Click to shoot. Mobile: Use on-screen buttons to aim and shoot.
tips: Focus on accuracy before speed. Breaking combo targets gives you extra score.
